# CPI Field Tools Design Guide
## Community Partners International — Field Data Collection & Tools

---

## KOBOTOOLBOX FORMS

### Branding Requirements:
- Form header: CPI logo (small, top-left) + "CPI Bangladesh — [Program Name]"
- Font: Arial (device font)
- Colors: CPI Red `#D91E4D` for section headers, CPI Purple `#41273B` for labels
- Language: English + Rohingya/Chittagonian translations where appropriate
- Footer: "CPI Bangladesh | cpi.bangladesh@cpintl.org"

### Form Structure Template:
```
[CPI Logo] CPI Bangladesh — [Program Name]

SECTION 1: IDENTIFICATION
  - Participant ID (FCN)
  - Camp: [dropdown]
  - Block: [dropdown]
  - Date: [auto]

SECTION 2: [SERVICE TYPE]
  - Service provided: [multiple choice]
  - Referral needed: [yes/no]
  - Notes: [text]

SECTION 3: FOLLOW-UP
  - Follow-up required: [yes/no]
  - Follow-up date: [date]
  - CHW name: [text]

[Footer]
```

---

## CHW LOGBOOK TEMPLATE

### Cover:
- CPI Logo top-left
- "COMMUNITY HEALTH WORKER LOGBOOK"
- Program: [Program Name] | CPI Bangladesh
- CHW Name: ____________
- Period: ____________

### Daily Entry Page:
```
Date: ____ / ____ / ______
Camp: ___________ Block: ___________

| Household ID | FCN | Service Provided | Referral? | Notes |
|-------------|-----|-----------------|-----------|-------|
| 1.           |     |                 |           |       |
| 2.           |     |                 |           |       |

Total Households Visited: _____
Total Referrals Made: _____
Key Observations:
_________________________
CHW Signature: ____________
```

---

## FIELD SUPERVISION FORM

```
CPI BANGLADESH — FIELD SUPERVISION CHECKLIST
Date: ____________ Supervisor: ____________

CHW Name: ____________ Camp: ____________

| # | Observation | Yes | No | Notes |
|---|------------|-----|-----|-------|
| 1 | Correct IEC materials carried | ☐ | ☐ | |
| 2 | Correct messaging used | ☐ | ☐ | |
| 3 | PPE/hygiene maintained | ☐ | ☐ | |
| 4 | Logbook completed correctly | ☐ | ☐ | |
| 5 | Referral protocol followed | ☐ | ☐ | |

Overall Assessment: ☐ Satisfactory ☐ Needs Improvement ☐ Unsatisfactory
Action Points:
1. ________________________________
2. ________________________________
Supervisor Signature: ____________
CHW Signature: ____________
```

---

## HEALTH TALK / GROUP SESSION REGISTER

```
CPI BANGLADESH — HEALTH TALK REGISTER
Date: ____________ Camp: ____________ Block: ____________

Topic: ____________ Facilitator: ____________

| # | Participant Name | Age | Sex | FCN | Contact |
|---|-----------------|-----|-----|-----|--------|
| 1 | | | | | |
| 2 | | | | | |

Total Participants: _____ Male: _____ Female: _____
Key Questions Raised:
_________________________
Facilitator Signature: ____________
```

---

## FIELD SUPPLY TRACKER

```
CPI BANGLADESH — FIELD SUPPLY TRACKER
Program: ____________ Month: ____________

| Item | Opening Balance | Received | Used | Closing Balance | Remarks |
|------|----------------|----------|------|----------------|--------|
| | | | | | |

Requested by: ____________
Approved by: ____________
```

---

## BRANDING ON FIELD TOOLS

- All field tools must include CPI logo (small, corner placement)
- Use CPI Purple `#41273B` for headers, CPI Black `#2D2926` for content
- Watermark CPI butterfly mark at 20% opacity on reference materials
- Language: Simple English + Rohingya/Bengali translations
- Paper/print: Durable, weather-resistant where possible
- Digital forms: KoboToolbox, ODK, or Google Forms following CPI color scheme
